attestation.attestation_note: Three errors corrected on review: (1) Radius role was imported as full-time 'Software Engineer' — it is a co-op; title and employment_type fixed. (2) Cost-savings metrics were overstated in scope — '$7.2M annually' and '66% company-wide' reframed as internal estimates scoped to the actual workload/team, not sole company-wide attribution. (3) Removed Kafka, Spark, Airflow, and Jenkins from skills — added aspirationally and not backed by hands-on production experience in any role.

identity.name: Laksh Dhamija
identity._note: Phone and email intentionally omitted — this file is committed to a public fork and the engine does not score on contact info.

experience.title: Software Engineer, Co-op
highlights: Built the observability stack from the ground up (OpenTelemetry, Grafana dashboards, alerting rules, incident.io lifecycle workflows); reduced mean time to detection to under 2 minutes.
Built Terraform CI/CD pipelines (plan-on-PR, apply-on-merge) in GitHub Actions with dedicated GCP service accounts and cross-project IAM bindings.
Implemented least-privilege IAM/RBAC via reusable Terraform modules (org policies, custom roles, Google Groups, folder hierarchy, audit log sinks, PAM entitlements).
Automated chaos engineering on Kubernetes (Chaos Mesh, Argo Workflows, Kargo), gating environment promotions on Prometheus-verified experiments.
Designed an E2E testing framework in GitHub Actions with automated upgrade tests and path-based CI triggers.

experience.title: Lead Engineer
highlights: Engineered a config-driven Workflows platform on GCP Pub/Sub processing 500K+ DB change events/sec (backpressure, fault isolation, ordering keys, at-least-once delivery, retries, dead-letter queues).
Optimized autoscaling and right-sized compute across the team's distributed infrastructure; estimated ~$7.2M annualized savings (internal estimate; team initiative, not sole attribution).
Designed a data archival architecture that cut infrastructure cost on the analytical/storage workload by ~66% (workload-scoped estimate, not company-wide).

experience.title: Software Development Engineer III
highlights: Built a real-time monitoring framework surfacing idle/over-provisioned resources across large-scale distributed systems; estimated ~$800K/year cloud-spend reduction (internal estimate).
Led stress and scale testing with a team of 4; caught ~75% of issues pre-release with zero production escalations.
Owned tier-2 on-call rotation: incident triage, distributed-system debugging, root-cause analysis.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer II / I
highlights: Scaled an event-driven distributed platform through a 100x traffic surge (p99 8s → 200ms, capacity +250%, failover 10s → 0.5s); awarded Techie of the Year.
Built a rule engine in Python and Java with an event-driven REST API surface; reduced manual workflow turnaround ~85%.
Built an internal sales-analytics platform 0-to-1 (AWS SNS/SQS event pipeline, ~50k events/hour; React dashboards) that became the GTM team's source of truth and helped secure the seed round.

projects.name: BillEase
projects.context: MIT Sandbox Innovation Fund — Cambridge, MA
highlights: Building a FinTech platform to centralize credit-card payments and maximize user rewards.
Driving prototype development and customer research with MIT Sloan mentors (Lean Launchpad).
